title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 January 2025

section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 17 January 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 18/01/2025
This week in ship recycling, the markets across all major destinations followed their ongoing trends, some more predictably than others. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-01-18_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-11-January-17-January2025_compressed.pdf

Weekly Ship Recycling Report
11 January - 17 January 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
This week in ship recycling, the markets across all major destinations followed their ongoing trends, some more predictably than others. India saw no
improvements-if anything, the market dipped slightly further.
